subcodes.first_line: O spiritual companions! The appearance of the Ancient Light and the All-Powerful, Ever-Living One is an all-encompassing bounty and a universal force. A sheltering shade it is [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران معنوی ظهور نور قدیم و حی قدیر فیض شاملست و قوتی جامع ظل ظلیل است و
subcodes.subjects: @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @unity; oneness of humanity
